title: IDENTIFICATION INFORMATION — Prefix and suffix designations (Cont'd)

figures_detected.description: Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) arrangement diagram showing the breakdown of each position in the VIN: SJN E/F A A K11 U 4 XXXXXX, with leader lines to descriptions of each field

content_blocks.text:
VIN structure: SJN E A A K11 U 4 XXXXXX

Position descriptions:
- SJN : Nissan, Passenger vehicle
- E : 3-door Hatchback
- F : 5-door Hatchback
- A : CG10DE engine
- D : CG13DE engine
- C : VJX engine
- A : 2-wheel drive model
- K11 : Model
- U : For Europe
- 4 : Fixed digit
- XXXXXX : Vehicle serial number

model_notes: E = 3-door Hatchback; F = 5-door Hatchback. Engines: CG10DE (A), CG13DE (D), VJX (C). Drive: A = 2-wheel drive. Market: U = For Europe.
